steps.t: Maethon stashed a number of parchments to distribute on behalf of the Heirs of Castamir in a crate outside the Hall of Ost Anglebed, to the north-east…
Residents of Ost Anglebed can be found throughout the city if you wish to hand out the parchments, <rgb=#00FF00>or</rgb> you can burn Maet…
Maethon will want to hear about your efforts on behalf of the Heirs of Castamir. He should still be at the lit beacon of Amon Anglebed.
A guardsman of Ost Anglebed, Ladben, stands by the lit beacon.
Ladben asked you to bring the container of beacon oil to Halwen for safekeeping. Halwen keeps watch over the supplies near the north-east fountain in …
Maethon stands beside the stairs to the Hall of Ost Anglebed, calling for you in hushed tones.
Halwen stands by the supplies near the north-east fountain in Ost Anglebed.
Halwen believed your story that Ladben needs a barrel of weapons, and she told you to take one from the other side of the fountain. She warned you tha…
Maethon stands below the cliff south of the eastern entrance to Ost Anglebed.
